name: carmelosantana/coqui-awesome-wp
description: Comprehensive WordPress management toolkit for Coqui — multi-site REST API + WP-CLI integration for content, users, plugins, themes, media, menus, settings, health monitoring, custom code scaffolding, and more

suggest.coquibot/coqui-toolkit-wp-cli: Enables WP-CLI operations (database, wp-config.php, core updates, scaffold deploy via SSH)

php-agents.description: WordPress management via REST API + WP-CLI — multi-site connections, content, users, plugins, themes, media, menus, blocks, settings, health monitoring, wp-config, custom plugin/theme scaffolding

AWP_DEFAULT_URL.description: Default WordPress site URL (e.g. https://example.com) — optional if using multi-site manager

AWP_DEFAULT_USERNAME.description: Default WordPress username for REST API authentication — optional if using multi-site manager

AWP_DEFAULT_APP_PASSWORD.description: Default WordPress Application Password for REST API authentication — generate at Users → Profile → Application Passwords
